top_signals.title: Tech Drives US Stocks Higher as Nvidia, Other Chipmakers Advance
top_signals.summary: US stocks advanced, led by semiconductor companies, as traders braced for a deluge of earnings reports that will test whether Big Tech’s profits can match high expectations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Immigration Policies Hammer Mexican Grocery Chain Chedraui
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown is causing the worst rout on the Mexican stock exchange this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DEME to Install Foundations at Zeevonk Offshore Wind Farm
top_signals.summary: Belgium marine contractor DEME has secured a contract to transport and install foundations for the first phase of the Zeevonk offshore wind farm in the Netherlands.The project, jointly owned by Vattenfall and Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners through its Energy Transition Fund I…
